# Extraction Checklist

Use this checklist when analyzing fetched page content. Check off each category as you extract it.

---

## Colors

- [ ] Primary/accent color (buttons, links, highlights)
- [ ] Secondary accent (hover states, gradients)
- [ ] Page background color(s)
- [ ] Card/section alternate backgrounds
- [ ] Primary text color
- [ ] Muted/secondary text color
- [ ] Heading text color (if different from body)
- [ ] Border/divider color
- [ ] Link color + hover color
- [ ] Gradient definitions
- [ ] Overlay/backdrop colors
- [ ] Success/error/warning/info colors (if present)
- [ ] Selection/highlight color (if custom)

## Typography

- [ ] Primary body font family + fallback stack
- [ ] Heading font family (if different)
- [ ] Monospace/code font (if present)
- [ ] Google Fonts or web font imports (note the URL)
- [ ] Font size scale (at least: xs, sm, base, lg, xl, 2xl, 3xl, 4xl)
- [ ] Font weights used (list all observed: 400, 500, 600, 700, 800)
- [ ] Line heights (body, headings, tight, relaxed)
- [ ] Letter spacing (headings, labels, uppercase text)
- [ ] Text transform patterns (uppercase labels, sentence case)

## Spacing

- [ ] Container/max-width for main content
- [ ] Section vertical padding (desktop)
- [ ] Section vertical padding (mobile)
- [ ] Grid gap values
- [ ] Card inner padding
- [ ] Button padding (horizontal + vertical)
- [ ] Input/form field padding
- [ ] Nav height / padding
- [ ] Footer padding
- [ ] Gap between heading and paragraph
- [ ] Gap between section label and title

## Shape & Effects

- [ ] Button border-radius
- [ ] Card border-radius
- [ ] Input border-radius
- [ ] Badge/pill border-radius
- [ ] Image border-radius (if rounded)
- [ ] Box shadow — subtle (cards at rest)
- [ ] Box shadow — elevated (hover, modals)
- [ ] Box shadow — glow (accent-colored)
- [ ] Text shadow (if present)
- [ ] Backdrop blur (nav, overlays)
- [ ] Border widths and styles
- [ ] Opacity values on overlays/backgrounds

## Transitions & Animations

- [ ] Default transition duration (e.g., 0.2s, 0.3s)
- [ ] Default transition easing (ease, ease-in-out, cubic-bezier)
- [ ] Hover transform (translateY, scale)
- [ ] Hover color/border transitions
- [ ] Entrance animations (fade-in, slide-up)
- [ ] Loading/skeleton animations
- [ ] Scroll-triggered animations (if CSS-only)

## Layout & Grid

- [ ] Overall page layout strategy (single column, sidebar, etc.)
- [ ] Grid system (CSS Grid, Flexbox patterns)
- [ ] Column counts at different breakpoints
- [ ] `auto-fit` / `auto-fill` with `minmax()` values
- [ ] Flex direction changes at breakpoints
- [ ] Sticky/fixed positioning patterns (nav, sidebar)
- [ ] Z-index layering (nav, modals, overlays)

## Breakpoints

- [ ] Mobile breakpoint (typically 640px or 768px)
- [ ] Tablet breakpoint (if separate from mobile)
- [ ] Desktop breakpoint (if explicit, e.g., 1024px or 1280px)
- [ ] What hides at mobile (nav links, stats, columns)
- [ ] What stacks at mobile (grids, flex rows)
- [ ] Font size reductions at mobile
- [ ] Padding reductions at mobile

## Components Found

Check each component observed on the page:

- [ ] Navigation (sticky, transparent, hamburger)
- [ ] Hero section
- [ ] Buttons (primary, secondary, outline, ghost)
- [ ] Cards (feature, content, pricing, testimonial)
- [ ] Grid / multi-column layouts
- [ ] Steps / timeline / process flow
- [ ] Code blocks / pre-formatted text
- [ ] Forms (inputs, selects, textareas, labels)
- [ ] Badges / tags / pills
- [ ] CTA banner / section
- [ ] Footer
- [ ] Testimonials / quotes
- [ ] Pricing table / tiers
- [ ] Accordion / FAQ / collapsible
- [ ] Modal / dialog / overlay
- [ ] Tabs / tab panels
- [ ] Carousel / slider
- [ ] Image gallery
- [ ] Stats / metrics bar
- [ ] Logo cloud / partner logos
- [ ] Social proof section
- [ ] Alert / notification bar
- [ ] Breadcrumbs
- [ ] Pagination
- [ ] Table / data grid
